properties.description: Application brand mark: a stylized white 'Z' letterform on a near-black (#2D2D2D) rounded-rectangle background, 30×30 viewBox. The Z is composed of three white shapes (top bar, diagonal stroke, bottom bar) grouped under a CSS 'z-breathe' animation that pulses opacity from 0.7 to 1.0 over 2.5s ease-in-out. Used as the primary app icon and manifest icon.
The visual identity of the Sanad legal practice management application, expressed through the Z-mark logo icon.

A minimalist geometric 'Z' letterform constructed from three SVG paths/polygons in white on a dark rounded-rectangle badge. The top and bottom horizontal bars have angled ends to smoothly connect with the diagonal stroke.

An inline CSS @keyframes animation named 'breathe' applied to the .z-breathe class. Cycles opacity from 0.7 at 0%/100% to 1.0 at 50% over 2.5s with ease-in-out timing, repeated infinitely. Creates a subtle pulsing/living-brand effect on the Z letterform.
Role of logo.svg as the primary application icon referenced by the PWA web manifest and layout metadata, providing the favicon and home-screen icon for the Sanad app.
